summary: Completed testing of OFI (Order Flow Imbalance) feature and 2s10s Yield Curve migration. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend tests passed (100%). OFI endpoint returns ofi_fast, ofi_slow, absorption_flag, signal, source fields. Treasury endpoint returns us2y, us10y, spread_bps, spread_type=2s10s, curve_state, score (0-4), max_score=4. Market Regime now shows score out of /13 max.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/ofi/MNQ returns 200 with ofi_fast, ofi_slow, absorption_flag, signal, source
✅ GET /api/ofi/MES returns 200 with OFI data
✅ GET /api/ofi/INVALID returns 404
✅ OFI values in valid range [-1, +1]
✅ OFI has interpretation field
✅ GET /api/treasury returns 200 with us2y, us10y, spread_bps, spread_type=2s10s
✅ Treasury curve_state is valid (STEEP/NORMAL/FLAT/INVERTED/DEEP_INVERSION)
✅ Treasury score is 0-4 with max_score=4
✅ Treasury yields in reasonable range (0-10%)
✅ POST /api/analyze includes ofi field with all required fields
✅ POST /api/analyze includes treasury with 2s10s spread
✅ POST /api/analyze includes cvd and tick_index alongside ofi
✅ Analyze has all 4 regime components (VIX, Treasury, Gamma, Term Structure)
✅ Frontend: OFI panel visible with data-testid='ofi-panel'
✅ Frontend: OFI Fast element shows value (-0.246)
✅ Frontend: OFI Slow element shows value (-0.152)
✅ Frontend: OFI Absorption shows INACTIVE status
✅ Frontend: OFI Signal shows NEUTRAL
✅ Frontend: OFI Interpretation shows simulated data message
✅ Frontend: Treasury panel shows '2s10s (US2Y / US10Y)' label
✅ Frontend: Treasury shows US 2Y (3.720%)
✅ Frontend: Treasury shows US 10Y (4.313%)
✅ Frontend: Treasury shows SPREAD 2s10s (+0.593, 59 bps)
✅ Frontend: Treasury curve state shows NORMAL (3/4)
✅ Frontend: Market Regime shows score 6/13 (max 13 pts)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses live yfinance data for Treasury, simulated DataBento data for OFI (market closed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OFI feature fully tested. OFI endpoint /api/ofi/{symbol} returns ofi_fast (30s/500 trades window), ofi_slow (3min/2000 trades window), absorption_flag (|OFI_Fast| > 0.7 AND Price_Delta < 2 ticks). Treasury migrated from 10s30s to 2s10s spread (^UST2Y/^TNX) with 5 states (0-4 pts). Market Regime recalibrated to max 13 pts: VIX(0-3) + Yield(0-4) + Gamma(0-3) + TermStructure(0-3). Current observed: OFI simulated (market closed), Treasury NORMAL (3/4), Regime TRANSICAO (6/13).

feature_verification.ofi_endpoint: Working - GET /api/ofi/{symbol} returns ofi_fast, ofi_slow, absorption_flag, signal, source
feature_verification.treasury_endpoint: Working - GET /api/treasury returns us2y, us10y, spread_bps, spread_type=2s10s, score (0-4)
feature_verification.analyze_treasury_2s10s: Working - POST /api/analyze includes treasury with spread_type=2s10s
feature_verification.ofi_panel: Working - Shows OFI Fast, OFI Slow, Absorption, Signal, Interpretation
feature_verification.treasury_panel: Working - Shows US 2Y, US 10Y, SPREAD 2s10s, curve_state with score/4

mocked_api_note: OFI uses simulated data when market is closed (Saturday). Treasury uses live yfinance data.
